What We Do

Heating, Cooling & Refrigeration Services

One trusted team for your home and your business — residential comfort to commercial refrigeration.

01

A/C Installation

Right-sized, high-efficiency air conditioning systems — installed clean and guaranteed for life.

Get a quote
02

A/C Repair

Fast, accurate diagnostics and repairs to get your system cooling again — same-day & emergency.

Get a quote
03

Air Duct Installation

Properly designed ductwork for balanced airflow, cleaner air and lower energy bills.

Get a quote
04

Heater & Furnace Installation

Reliable heating systems sized for Texas winters, with furnace and boiler repair on call.

Get a quote
05

Commercial Refrigeration

Walk-ins, coolers and freezers kept running — minimizing downtime and protecting your inventory.

Get a quote
06

Restaurant Kitchen Equipment

Repair and maintenance for commercial kitchen equipment so your service never skips a beat.

About Cold Texas Air

Comfort You Can Count On

We get it — your comfort is non-negotiable. That's why we go the extra mile to provide solutions tailored to your unique needs. Our principle is to provide exceptional HVAC services with a commitment to quality, excellence, reliability and customer satisfaction.

We aim to create comfortable homes through innovative solutions, a customer-centric approach and a dedication to exceeding expectations — across Ft. Bend and surrounding counties.

Integrity & Transparency

Honest pricing and ethical practices in everything we do.

Prompt Response

Fast, efficient service when you need it most.

Customized Solutions

Systems designed around your home, budget and goals.

Always Available

After-hours emergency service, 24 hours a day.
